description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named RPM Build that runs on push to the master branch, ignoring changes to docs, README.md, and NEWS.md, and triggering on any tag. Use an ubuntu-latest job to check out the code, build an RPM package from a spec file using tstack/rpmbuild, upload the RPM as a GitHub artifact, and then upload it to packagecloud.io using the PACKAGECLOUD_TOKEN from secrets.
